TRADE_EXECUTED: An yi ciniki naka cikin nasara
PORTFOLIO_UPDATED: An sabunta jakar hannun jari naka
RISK_ALERT: Gargaɗin haɗari: Matsayinka ya wuce iyakar haɗari
PAYMENT_SCHEDULED: An tsara biyan kuɗi naka don {date}
PAYMENT_EXECUTED: An aiwatar da biyan kuɗi da aka tsara
PAYMENT_CANCELLED: An soke biyan kuɗi da aka tsara
PAYMENT_REMINDER: Tunawa: Kana da biyan kuɗi da aka tsara don {date}
